mapper.select: SELECT s.SCHEDULE_ID, s.SCHEDULE_LABEL AS SCHEDULE_NAME, s.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS AS SCHEDULE_TYPE, s.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES AS CRON_EXPRESSION, NULL AS POLICY_ID, s.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID AS TARGET_GROUP_ID, s.SCHEDULE_STATUS AS STATUS_YN, s.SCHEDULE_TARGET_NAME AS DESCRIPTION, NULL AS LAST_RUN_DT, s.SCHEDULE_NEXT_SCAN AS NEXT_RUN_DT, s.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, d.DATATYPE_LABEL AS POLICY_NAME FROM pi_schedules s LEFT JOIN pi_datatypes d ON d.DATATYPE_ID = s.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES ORDER BY s.REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT s.SCHEDULE_ID, s.SCHEDULE_LABEL AS SCHEDULE_NAME, s.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS AS SCHEDULE_TYPE, s.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES AS CRON_EXPRESSION, NULL AS POLICY_ID, s.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID AS TARGET_GROUP_ID, s.SCHEDULE_STATUS AS STATUS_YN, s.SCHEDULE_TARGET_NAME AS DESCRIPTION, NULL AS LAST_RUN_DT, s.SCHEDULE_NEXT_SCAN AS NEXT_RUN_DT, s.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, d.DATATYPE_LABEL AS POLICY_NAME FROM pi_schedules s LEFT JOIN pi_datatypes d ON d.DATATYPE_ID = s.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES WHERE s.SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_schedules ( SCHEDULE_ID, AP_NO, SCHEDULE_LABEL, SCHEDULE_STATUS, SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS, SCHEDULE_REPEAT_MONTHS, SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID, SCHEDULE_TARGET_NAME, SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES, SCHEDULE_NEXT_SCAN, SCHEDULE_CPU, SCHEDULE_CAPTURE, SCHEDULE_TRACE, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{scheduleName}, 0, #{scheduleName}, 'scheduled', #{scheduleType}, NULL, #{targetGroupId}, #{description}, #{cronExpression}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_schedules SET SCHEDULE_LABEL = #{scheduleName}, SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS = #{scheduleType}, SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES = #{cronExpression}, SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID = #{targetGroupId}, SCHEDULE_TARGET_NAME = #{description}, SCHEDULE_STATUS = #{statusYn} WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_scan_history (TARGET_ID, AP_NO, STARTED, STATUS, REGDATE) VALUES (#{targetId}, 0, NOW(), 'RUNNING', CURDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT l.LOCATION_ID, l.DESCRIPTION AS LOCATION_NAME, l.PATH AS LOCATION_PATH, l.PROTOCOL AS LOCATION_TYPE, l.LOCATION_USE AS USE_YN FROM pi_locations l ORDER BY l.DESCRIPTION

SELECT DATATYPE_ID AS datatypeId, DATATYPE_LABEL AS datatypeName, VERSION AS version, NULL AS datatypePattern, NULL AS description, CASE WHEN DISABLED = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS useYn FROM pi_datatypes ORDER BY DATATYPE_LABEL

SELECT sp.IDX AS policyId, sp.POLICY_NAME AS policyName, sp.DATATYPE_ID AS datatypeIds, NULL AS locationIds, sp.COMMENT AS description, CASE WHEN sp.ENABLE = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS useYn, sp.REGDATE AS regDt, NULL AS regUser, NULL AS modDt, sp.SCHEDULE_CPU AS cpuLimit, sp.POLICY_VERSION AS scanDepth, 0 AS scheduleCount FROM pi_scan_policy sp WHERE sp.ENABLE = 1 ORDER BY sp.REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_policy WHERE ENABLE = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_scan_policy ( POLICY_NAME, POLICY_VERSION, REGDATE, COMMENT, DATATYPE_ID, SCHEDULE_LABEL, SCHEDULE_CPU, SCHEDULE_DATA, SCHEDULE_MEMORY, SCHEDULE_TRACE, ENABLE ) VALUES ( #{policyName}, '1.0', NOW(), #{description}, #{datatypeIds}, #{policyName}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_scan_policy SET POLICY_NAME = #{policyName}, COMMENT = #{description}, DATATYPE_ID = #{datatypeIds}, ENABLE = CASE WHEN #{useYn} = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, REGDATE = NOW() WHERE IDX = #{policyId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_schedules s INNER JOIN pi_scan_policy sp ON s.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES = sp.DATATYPE_ID WHERE sp.IDX = #{policyId}
